name: merge-mode re-run against unchanged URL keeps the same rules (byte-identical content_hash)
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o06-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/src.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Encrypt at rest
All data must be encrypted.

## Audit logging
Logs required.
MD
cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url $OUT/src.md --target-namespace us-government --framework-id o06 --source-id o06src --authoritative-publisher X --out-dir $OUT/out 2>/dev/null; H1=$(grep -oE 'content_hash: sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}' $OUT/out/us-government/o06.yaml | sort); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url $OUT/src.md --target-namespace us-government --framework-id o06 --source-id o06src --authoritative-publisher X --out-dir $OUT/out 2>/dev/null; H2=$(grep -oE 'content_hash: sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}' $OUT/out/us-government/o06.yaml | sort); [ "$H1" = "$H2" ] && echo merge-preserves-content-hash 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
